EvidenceFile.sourceSignature: export interface EvidenceFile { directory: string; path: string; name: string; relativePath: string; bytes: Uint8Array; sha256: string; }

JournalLinkageEvidence.sourceSignature: export interface JournalLinkageEvidence { kind: 'active journal' | 'completed ledger'; path: string; sha256: string; journal: HistoricalFirmwareJournal; }

PreflightLinkageEvidence.sourceSignature: export interface PreflightLinkageEvidence { path: string; sha256: string; record: HistoricalPreflightRecord; }

AuditLinkageEvidence.sourceSignature: export interface AuditLinkageEvidence { path: string; sha256: string; record: HistoricalTransactionAudit; }

WriteLockLinkageEvidence.sourceSignature: export interface WriteLockLinkageEvidence { path: string; lock: WriteLockV1; }

EvidenceLinkageInput.sourceSignature: export interface EvidenceLinkageInput { active: JournalLinkageEvidence | undefined; ledgers: readonly JournalLinkageEvidence[]; preflights: readonly PreflightLinkageEvidence[]; audits: readonly AuditLinkageEvidence[]; writeLock: WriteLockLinkageEvidence | undefined; }

FirmwareTransactionRecovery.sourceSignature: export interface FirmwareTransactionRecovery { state?: FirmwareUpdateState; blockingReason?: string; writeLockPresent: boolean; }

FirmwareTransactionStoreTestHooks.sourceSignature: export interface FirmwareTransactionStoreTestHooks { beforeWriteLockAcquire?(preparationId: string): Promise<void>; afterWriteLockAcquire?(preparationId: string): Promise<void>; afterWriteAdmissionPersist?(preparationId: string): Promise<void>; }

FirmwareTransactionStoreRuntime.sourceSignature: export interface FirmwareTransactionStoreRuntime extends FirmwareTransactionClockPort, FirmwareTransactionIdentityPort {}

FirmwareWriteSession.sourceSignature: export interface FirmwareWriteSession { readonly preparationId: string; readonly dfuIdentity: DfuIdentity; admitWrite(state: FirmwareUpdateState): Promise<void>; persist(state: FirmwareUpdateState): Promise<void>; writeAudit<Stage extends TransactionAuditStage>(stage: Stage, value: AuditValue<Stage>): Promise<void>; archiveCompleted(state: FirmwareUpdateState): Promise<void>; releaseBeforeWrite(): Promise<void>; releaseAfterArchive(): Promise<void>; }

FirmwareTransactionStore.sourceSignature: class FirmwareTransactionStore { get completedSessionArchived(): boolean; recover(): Promise<FirmwareTransactionRecovery>; persist(state: FirmwareUpdateState): Promise<void>; recordPreflightAndPersist(recordValue: FirmwarePreflightRecord, stateValue: FirmwareUpdateState): Promise<void>; acquireWriteSession(preparationId: string, dfuIdentity: DfuIdentity): Promise<FirmwareWriteSession>; writeLockExists(): Promise<boolean>; archiveCompletedRecovery(state: FirmwareUpdateState): Promise<void> }

invocations.sourceSignature: writeAudit<Stage extends TransactionAuditStage>(stage: Stage, value: AuditValue<Stage>): Promise<void>

errors.description: Completion chain is absent, duplicated, malformed, or conflicting.

invocations.outputDescription: Recovered current state, blocking reason, and lock presence.
